Prepopulate start dates and due dates for task based on when you start a project or when the target completion date is.
Relative days to use as the start date for this task - if you enter 7 and chose from "Start of Project", the task start date would be calculated and set to 7 days after the project start date.
Relative days to use as the due date for this task - if you enter 3 and chose from "Project Due Date", the task due date would be set to 3 days before the due date.

When true, project is hidden from ALL portal datasets (lists, board, sprints, analytics, client portal). Visible only in Projects > Archived. Orthogonal to status.
When the project was archived (set on archive, cleared on revive).
Total budget ceiling for this project (USD). Drives the client-facing Budget Burn widget: invoiced + billable expenses vs this cap. Null = no budget set (widget shows an empty state).
Per-section client visibility map (section key -> bool). Null = all sections visible. Managed from the portal project page.
